hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "" && echo "=== DIRECTORS PALETTE SESSION START ===" && echo "Branch: $(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "not a git repo")" && echo "" && CHANGES=$(git status --short 2>/dev/null | wc -l); if [ "$CHANGES" -gt 0 ]; then echo "WARNING: $CHANGES uncommitted changes found!"; git status --short | head -10; echo ""; echo "COMMIT THESE BEFORE STARTING NEW WORK!"; else echo "Git status: Clean - no uncommitted changes"; fi && echo "==========================================" && echo ""'
